Alright, in this video we're going to make our HTTP Google Sheet. I like to go to Sheets, if you don't have Sheets listed here you can go to Drives, so we'll do it that way this time. And then you're going to click on the New button and choose Google Sheets. Once this is open, we do Untitled Spreadsheet, we'll put HTTP, whatever you want to call it, it's up to you. And here we're going to put our same old name, phone, email. And this one we can put applied. And then this one we can get scheduled. Just for reference, I like to put once instead of a yes-no value in here, just if they applied, go ahead and put a 1, if they didn't, and then tallying a month later is super simple. And then that's all you really have to do for your HTTP Google Sheet. The next thing you need is this app.
